queries.sql: SELECT level, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE level IN ('error', 'warn') GROUP BY level UNION ALL SELECT level, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE level IN ('info', 'debug') GROUP BY level ORDER BY level ASC

expected.note: UNION ALL combining two filtered GROUP BY results

queries.sql: SELECT code, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE code >= 400 GROUP BY code UNION SELECT code, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE code = 200 GROUP BY code ORDER BY code ASC

SELECT 'fast' AS category, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(took) AS avg_took FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE took < 50 UNION ALL SELECT 'medium' AS category, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(took) AS avg_took FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE took >= 50 AND took < 200 UNION ALL SELECT 'slow' AS category, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(took) AS avg_took FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE took >= 200 ORDER BY category ASC

expected.note: Triple UNION ALL with computed aggregates per speed tier (avg_took may not appear when bucket is empty)

queries.sql: SELECT code, level, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY code, level HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 UNION ALL SELECT NULL AS code, level, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE code >= 500 GROUP BY level ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 8

expected.note: UNION with NULL literal column; LIMIT 8

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, log FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE level = 'error' UNION ALL SELECT _timestamp, log FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE level = 'warn' ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 10

expected.note: UNION ALL across error+warn; DESC LIMIT 10

queries.sql:
WITH zone_agg AS (SELECT facility_zone AS location, 'zone' AS granularity, COUNT(*) AS total, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY facility_zone),
center_agg AS (SELECT control_center AS location, 'center' AS granularity, COUNT(*) AS total, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY control_center),
combined AS (SELECT * FROM zone_agg UNION ALL SELECT * FROM center_agg)
SELECT * FROM combined ORDER BY granularity ASC, avg_tput DESC

expected.note: Two CTEs with different GROUP BY levels, UNION ALL, then ordered by granularity

queries.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN charge_remaining < 35.0 THEN 'low_charge' WHEN charge_remaining BETWEEN 35.0 AND 70.0 THEN 'medium_charge' ELSE 'high_charge' END AS category, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp), 2) AS avg_temp, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY category ORDER BY category ASC

expected.note: CASE-based charge tier aggregation (single SELECT, no UNION)

queries.sql:
SELECT facility_zone, sorter_model, COUNT(*) AS cnt, MAX(throughput_rate) AS max_tput FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE operation_mode = 'auto' GROUP BY facility_zone, sorter_model
UNION
SELECT facility_zone, sorter_model, COUNT(*) AS cnt, MAX(throughput_rate) AS max_tput FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE operation_mode = 'hybrid' GROUP BY facility_zone, sorter_model
ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, max_tput DESC

expected.note: UNION (dedup) of auto vs hybrid aggregations, same shape different WHERE

queries.sql:
WITH auto_top AS (SELECT facility_zone, sorter_model, throughput_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS rn FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE operation_mode='auto' AND throughput_rate IS NOT NULL),
manual_top AS (SELECT facility_zone, sorter_model, throughput_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS rn FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE operation_mode='manual' AND throughput_rate IS NOT NULL)
SELECT facility_zone, sorter_model, throughput_rate, rn, 'auto' AS mode FROM auto_top WHERE rn <= 2
UNION ALL
SELECT facility_zone, sorter_model, throughput_rate, rn, 'manual' AS mode FROM manual_top WHERE rn <= 2
ORDER BY mode ASC, facility_zone ASC, rn ASC

expected.note: Two CTEs with ROW_NUMBER, then UNION ALL top-2 per zone per mode

queries.sql:
SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, load_factor, 'day_shift' AS shift FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE runtime_hours IS NOT NULL AND CAST(FLOOR(CAST(runtime_hours AS FLOAT) / 24.0) AS INTEGER) % 2 = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, load_factor, 'night_shift' AS shift FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE runtime_hours IS NOT NULL AND CAST(FLOOR(CAST(runtime_hours AS FLOAT) / 24.0) AS INTEGER) % 2 = 1
ORDER BY shift ASC, load_factor DESC
LIMIT 20

expected.note: UNION ALL splitting by computed shift (MOD of runtime_hours), ordered within shifts

queries.sql:
WITH ranked_all AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, throughput_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS rn FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL)
SELECT facility_zone, pallet_id, throughput_rate, rn, 'LEADER' AS label FROM ranked_all WHERE rn = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT facility_zone, pallet_id, throughput_rate, rn, 'RUNNER_UP' AS label FROM ranked_all WHERE rn = 2
UNION ALL
SELECT facility_zone, pallet_id, throughput_rate, rn, 'TRAILING' AS label FROM ranked_all WHERE rn >= 5
ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, rn ASC

expected.note: CTE with ROW_NUMBER, then three-way UNION ALL for LEADER/RUNNER_UP/TRAILING

queries.sql: SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE operation_mode='auto') AS auto_cnt, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE operation_mode='manual') AS manual_cnt, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate) FILTER (WHERE operation_mode='auto'), 2) AS avg_tput_auto, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate) FILTER (WHERE operation_mode='manual'), 2) AS avg_tput_manual, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp) FILTER (WHERE operation_mode='auto'), 2) AS avg_temp_auto, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp) FILTER (WHERE operation_mode='manual'), 2) AS avg_temp_manual FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY facility_zone ASC

expected.note: FILTER-based per-mode aggregation (auto vs manual) without UNION
